title: Share a project via a public link
description: Ergonomics probe for project-sharing discoverability: a project needs to exist and get a link share, exercising the create-share composite (src/tools/projects/sharing.ts).
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Shared Roadmap" with one task called "{{prefix}}kickoff", then share the project via a read-only public link so it can be sent to a client.
